question: Yokohama F·Marinos vs. FC Tōkyō: O/U 4.5
description:
In the upcoming J1 100 Year Vision League game between Yokohama F·Marinos and FC Tōkyō, scheduled for April 11 at 2:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if Yokohama F·Marinos and FC Tōkyō combine to score 5 or more goals in this game.

If the combined total is less than 5, this market will resolve to "Under".

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on jleague.jp. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 2 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Yokohama F·Marinos vs. FC Tōkyō - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the J1 100 Year Vision League game, scheduled for April 11 at 2:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Yokohama F. Marinos' superior home record at Nissan Stadium drives trader consensus favoring them over FC Tokyo in this J1 League matchup, with markets implying around 55-60% win probability for the hosts. Marinos boast three wins in their last four league games, powered by Anderson Lopes' 15 goals, while dominating recent head-to-heads (4-1 in last five). FC Tokyo's away form falters, winless in five road outings, though Diego Oliveira's scoring threat persists despite a thin squad post-international break. No major injuries reported officially, but Marinos' rest edge after a lighter schedule could prove decisive amid title-chasing momentum versus Tokyo's mid-table push for ACL qualification.

question: Yokohama F·Marinos vs. FC Tōkyō: Both Teams to Score
description:
In the upcoming J1 100 Year Vision League game between Yokohama F·Marinos and FC Tōkyō, scheduled for April 11 at 2:00 AM ET:

This market will resolve to "Yes" if both Yokohama F·Marinos and FC Tōkyō each score at least one goal during the game.

events.title: FC Machida Zelvia vs. Kashiwa Reysol - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the J1 100 Year Vision League game, scheduled for April 11 at 1:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Machida Zelvia's 10-match unbeaten streak in J1 League play, including a robust home record at Machida Gion Stadium, anchors trader consensus favoring them heavily over Kashiwa Reysol, with implied probabilities around 60% for a Zelvia win. Zelvia sit third in the standings, chasing title contention after a gritty 1-1 draw versus Yokohama F. Marinos, while Reysol languish in 14th following a 2-1 home loss to Sagan Tosu and dismal away form (winless in six road games). Key absences include Reysol's suspended Kento Tachibana and injured Diego, tilting momentum toward Zelvia ahead of this July 14 clash, though J.League upsets remain common amid tight scheduling.

events.title: Avispa Fukuoka vs. V-Varen Nagasaki - More Markets
events.description: More markets for the J1 100 Year Vision League game, scheduled for April 11 at 1:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Avispa Fukuoka's strong home record at Best Denki Stadium anchors trader consensus favoring them over J2 side V-Varen Nagasaki in this Emperor's Cup clash, with implied probabilities reflecting about 55-60% for an Avispa win amid their mid-table J1 stability. Recent developments include Avispa's unbeaten run in four straight home games, bolstered by midfielder Shahab Zahedi's scoring form (3 goals in last 5), while Nagasaki grapples with defensive injuries to key center-back Kim Min-ho, out for weeks per official reports. Nagasaki's promotion push adds motivation, but their poor away form (1 win in 8) and historical 0-2 deficit in head-to-heads tilt odds. Watch for weather in Fukuoka and potential rotation ahead of league fixtures.

eventMetadata.context_description: Avispa Fukuoka's strong home record at Best Denki Stadium anchors trader consensus favoring them over J2 side V-Varen Nagasaki in this Emperor's Cup clash, with implied probabilities reflecting about 55-60% for an Avispa win amid their mid-table J1 stability. Recent developments include Avispa's unbeaten run in four straight home games, bolstered by midfielder Shahab Zahedi's scoring form (3 goals in last 5), while Nagasaki grapples with defensive injuries to key center-back Kim Min-ho, out for weeks per official reports. Nagasaki's promotion push adds motivation, but their poor away form (1 win in 8) and historical 0-2 deficit in head-to-heads tilt odds. Watch for weather in Fukuoka and potential rotation ahead of league fixtures.

question: Avispa Fukuoka vs. V-Varen Nagasaki: O/U 3.5

events.description: More markets for the J1 100 Year Vision League game, scheduled for April 11 at 1:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Sanfrecce Hiroshima's strong J1 League position and recent form heavily drive trader consensus favoring them over J2 side Shimizu S-Pulse in this Emperor's Cup clash. question: Legends Cricket League: Southern Super Stars vs India Tigers - Most Sixes Southern Super Stars Winner
description:
This market refers to which team hits the greater number of sixes in the cricket match between Southern Super Stars and India Tigers scheduled for 2026-03-22 in Legends Cricket League.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to Southern Super Stars will be considered correct if Southern Super Stars is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than India Tigers.The outcome corresponding to India Tigers will be considered correct if India Tigers is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Southern Super Stars.
If both teams record the same number of sixes, the market will resolve to "Draw".
The market will resolve according to the team that hits the greater number of sixes in the match regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions)/
Only sixes scored from the bat (off any delivery- legal or not) will count towards the total sixes. Overthrows and extras do not count. Sixes scored in a super over do not count.
In First Class games, only first innings sixes will count.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official sixes statistics being recorded, the market will resolve "Draw".
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.

question: Legends Cricket League: India Captains vs Royal Riders Punjab - Most Sixes India Captains Winner
description:
This market refers to which team hits the greater number of sixes in the cricket match between India Captains and Royal Riders Punjab scheduled for 2026-03-22 in Legends Cricket League.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to India Captains will be considered correct if India Captains is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than Royal Riders Punjab.The outcome corresponding to Royal Riders Punjab will be considered correct if Royal Riders Punjab is officially recorded as hitting more sixes than India Captains.
If both teams record the same number of sixes, the market will resolve to "Draw".
The market will resolve according to the team that hits the greater number of sixes in the match regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions)/
Only sixes scored from the bat (off any delivery- legal or not) will count towards the total sixes. Overthrows and extras do not count. Sixes scored in a super over do not count.
In First Class games, only first innings sixes will count.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official sixes statistics being recorded, the market will resolve "Draw".

This market refers to which team's player records the highest individual run total in the cricket match between India Captains and Royal Riders Punjab scheduled for 2026-03-22 in Legends Cricket League.
This market resolves according to the finalized match statistics as published by https://www.espncricinfo.com/.
The outcome corresponding to India Captains will be considered correct if the highest individual score in the match is recorded exclusively by a player from India Captains.
The outcome corresponding to Royal Riders Punjab will be considered correct if the highest individual score is recorded exclusively by a player from Royal Riders Punjab.
If the highest individual score is shared by at least one player from each team, the market will resolve to Draw.
The market will resolve according to which team's player records the highest individual run total regardless of if the match is not competed (e.g. Due to weather conditions).
DLS/DRS adjustments and any other on-field rulings affecting batting statistics are treated as ordinary data.
If the match is permanently canceled, abandoned, or otherwise completed without official batting statistics being recorded, the market will resolve Draw.
If the match is postponed or rescheduled, the market remains open until the listed fixture is completed and official statistics are available.
